action.reasoning: Observation: Position-aware model got val 0.8582. Best test is 0.7453. Analysis: Need better extrapolation. Additive models (sum of per-position effects) should extrapolate well from ≤2 to >2 mutations. Decision: 1) Update predict.py for v3 model, submit eval. 2) Train additive model on per-position embeddings.
